dj-help.description: List all dj-* commands, or show docs for a specific command

dj-sync.description: Pull latest template changes via Copier and resolve merge conflicts

dj-feedback.description: File a GitHub issue against the django-studio repo

dj-create-task.description: Add a background task using django-tasks-db

dj-create-command.description: Add a management command with tests

dj-create-cron.description: Schedule a management command as a Kubernetes cron job

dj-create-model.description: Design a model with factory, fixture, and tests

dj-create-crud.description: Full CRUD views, templates, URLs, and tests

dj-create-e2e.description: Write Playwright E2E test(s) for a described interaction

dj-create-filter.description: Add a template filter with correct escaping flags

dj-translate.description: Extract, translate, and compile message catalogue

dj-perf.description: Performance audit: N+1 queries, indexes, caching, async

dj-secure.description: Security audit: settings, views, XSS, CSRF, IDOR, SQLi

dj-gdpr.description: GDPR compliance audit: PII, erasure, consent, logging

dj-deadcode.description: Remove unused Python code, templates, and static assets

dj-full-coverage.description: Enable 100% coverage gate and write tests for all gaps

dj-launch-observability.description: Deploy the observability stack (Grafana + Prometheus + Loki)

dj-rotate-secrets.description: Rotate auto-generated and third-party Helm secrets and redeploy

dj-enable-db-backups.description: Enable automated daily PostgreSQL backups to Object Storage
